messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0039",
  "title": "中国游戏行业投融资相关事件",
  "page_index": 13,
  "page_range": "13"
}

Section text:
## 中国游戏行业投融资相关事件

message.content: This section, titled "中国游戏行业投融资相关事件" (China Gaming Industry Investment and Financing Related Events), serves as a structural heading for content tracking capital activities within the Chinese gaming sector. Based on the title, it is intended to answer retrieval questions regarding specific gaming companies involved in funding rounds, mergers, or acquisitions; investment amounts and valuation metrics; deal dates and funding stages; and participating investors or financial institutions. However, the provided excerpt contains only the section heading. No substantive narrative, tables, figures, definitions, procedures, claims, specific entities, dates, metrics, or evidence types are present in this excerpt.

It would answer questions about which companies received funding, investment amounts, deal timelines, and market trends, but the provided excerpt contains only the section title without substantive data, tables, or narrative content.

It is designed to answer retrieval questions about specific gaming companies involved in funding rounds, mergers, or acquisitions; investment amounts and valuation metrics; deal dates and funding stages; and key investors or financial institutions. However, the provided excerpt contains only the section title.
